Energy-Efficient Computing Operations
NLR provides advanced computing systems and services—and support their use—for applied energy research while advancing mathematics and scientific computing for energy applications.
High-Performance Computing Facilities
Housed in a data center with world-leading efficiency, NLR's computing system performance peaks at 56 petaflops and serves the needs of the U.S. Department of Energy, while data-centric offerings marshal data streams from the Energy System Integration Facility.
